title: Jump and COS
author: MathematicianSad6480
selftext:
You've all heard about quantitative ai trading bots. Most notably COS 

https://www.cosetek.com/?tid=MHH7U6

There is also another called Jumptradiny

https://jumptda.com/#/register?code=5VVI0S

I know these apps are probably ponzi/pyramid  schemes however I have personally made profit from these platforms. I believe that they are a good gamble for the first month. After the first month withdraw ur initial investment then its free money. 

I put 100 into it and have now withdrawn 200 with another few hundred pending.

If you need help getting set up or u are unsure about whether to get set up, just message me. I can show u photos of my withdrawals

If u want to invest it is a minimum of 50 dollars. Please don't invest in it if you can't afford to lose it. Thanks guys

comments.author: Born_Translator_1649
comments.body:
Jump Tradiny is the newest version of quantitative trading, months newer than COS and is the highest growing platform out there with a $200 sign up bonus and fantastic user benefits.

Simply deposit over $50 (around £45) and you will be untitled to unlock VIP LEVEL 1 and get 4 quantitative trades per day

If you need any help just give me a DM, happy to help!
